description.unified: Attacks a random enemy and its nearby enemies 3 times, dealing a total of ??? M.DMG and inflicting Stun for [1.8 sec->3 sec].

Creates a Seed of Belladonna around the target for [7 sec->10 sec]. The seed deals ??? M.DMG to nearby enemies every [1 sec->2 sec], [(added) increasing M.DMG the target takes by 30%] and reducing Heal Rate by [25%->30%] for [1 sec->5 sec].
Attacks enemies within a wide frontal range of self 6 times, dealing a total of ??? M.DMG and knocking them down for [1 sec->3 sec].

Normal and Skill attacks inflicts Poison on a target, dealing a total of ??? continuous M.DMG and reducing Heal Rate by [1%->5%] over 20 sec. Poison can be stacked up to max [25->5] times. If Lorraine dies, Poison effect on enemies will disappear.

dark.unified: Recovers own Mana by 250 upon a Critical Hit.
The duration of the CC on hit enemies increases by [20%->30%] for 5 sec.

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1000->1] but DMG is boosted by 100%.

dark.unified: Increases Mana Cost by [1000->1] and dispels positive effects of enemies within range.

light.unified: Reduces the target's ATK by [1%->5%] per stack of Poison.

dark.unified: If the target is a boss, increases DMG of Poison by [100%->x3].

description.unified: [Thornbush Forest] Increases DMG by 50% and reduces Cooldown by {0}.
[Seed of Belladonna] Reduces Mana Cost by 1, Mana of hit enemies by {0}, and recovers own Mana by [{2}->{1}].
[Wrath of the Forest] DMG is increased by {0}%. Upon Crit Hit on enemies with [5 or more->over 5] stacks of Poison, skill cooldown is reduced by 4%.
[Poison] Poison effect becomes irremovable and for the duration of Poison, target takes [DMG dealt to Bosses by {0}%->{0}% increased M.DMG]

dark.unified: At the beginning of each battle, immediately reduces all Skill Cooldown of self by 30% and increases DMG dealt to Non-Hero enemies by [10%->20%] for 90 sec. DMG Boost effect stacks up to max 5 times and is irremovable.

description.unified: Deals M.DMG equal to {0}% of ATK to enemies inflicted with Poison every 7 secm reducing M.DEF by {1}% and increasing M.DMG the target takes by {2}% for 10 sec.

Summons the soul of World Tree's Will, Roburu for 10 sec, dealing ??? DMG on a random enemy every 2 sec, increasing M.DMG it takes by 30% for 10 sec and inflicting Shackle for 2 sec. Also recovers own Mana by 500 [(added) and reduces Cooldown of all Skills by 1 sec] every 2 sec.

1.from: Increases own ATK by 45% for the duration of soul.
1.to: Increases own ATK by 50% for the duration of soul.
1.unified: Increases own ATK by [45%->50%] for the duration of soul.

2.from: For the duration of the soul, increases the duration of CC effects taken by all enemies by 30%.
2.to: Increases the duration of CC effects applied upon enemies by 30% and reduces thier M.DEF by 25% for the duration of soul.
2.unified: Increases the duration of CC effects [taken by all->applied upon] enemies by 30% [(added) and reduces thier M.DEF by 25%] for the duration of soul.
